summary: Excellent UltraMatrix matrix recording captures a solid 1990 European show with standout Ramble On Rose, Rider and Throwing Stones.
review: Both reviewers praise the upgraded UltraMatrix SBD/CM transfer as crisp, clear and the new go‑to source for this night. Musically the concert is described as an average‑to‑good performance overall, with a consistently solid first set and a second set that shines thanks to Ramble On Rose, Rider, Throwing Stones, Stella and a free‑form Playing segment. Phil’s bass work and Brent’s keyboard fireworks are highlighted, while Vince is hard to hear in the mix and a few songs (Saint, Promised Land) fall short.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed reviews: one mixed (3★) but very positive on audio; the other strongly positive (4★) on both sound and performance, leading to an overall rating above 4.

recording_quality.technical_notes: CM‑processed UltraMatrix transfer praised as the best available source; clear, balanced mix though Vince’s keyboards sit low and Bruce’s drum solo is less prominent on some mixes.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set solid and consistent with good energy; second set builds momentum, delivering several high points (Rider, Throwing Stones, Stella) that make it one of the year’s top performances despite a few average moments.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Fine form throughout; backs off when Bruce gets hot and shows humor during the encore.
band_member_comments.Phil: Particularly vibrant and bouncy; great synth‑bass adventure, uses 6‑string bass on Throwing Stones.
band_member_comments.Keys: Dual‑keys show with Brent (Bobby) going nuts; Vince low in the mix but overall keyboards add color.
band_member_comments.Drums: Bruce’s solo less evident on some mixes but generally solid; overall drum sound clear.
